name: dumpio/client
description: PHP client for the Dumpio dump viewer — sends faithful, typed value dumps and structured messages (exceptions, queries, HTTP, logs, models, …) over HTTP.

suggest.laravel/framework: Enables the Dumpio service provider (auto-discovered): config + auto-forwarding of queries, exceptions, dd()/dump(), and model/cache/job/app events.
suggest.symfony/http-kernel: Enables the Dumpio bundle and kernel.exception subscriber.
suggest.doctrine/dbal: Enables Symfony Doctrine query forwarding via the Dumpio DBAL middleware (requires DBAL 4).
